channel.title: World Real Estate Excellence Awards
channel.description: International real estate awards recognising excellence in property development, architecture, brokerage and luxury real estate globally.

item.title: World Real Estate Excellence Awards Gala — 14 November 2026
item.description: The World Real Estate Excellence Awards Gala Ceremony will be held at the Westin Marina Hotel, Dubai on 14 November 2026. Submit your nomination today.

item.title: Nominations Now Open — World Real Estate Excellence Awards 2026
item.description: Nominations are now open for the World Real Estate Excellence Awards 2026. Real estate developers, agencies, architects, brokers and interior designers from 90+ countries are invited to submit.
